nasb.text: The second one married her, and died leaving behind no children; and the third likewise;

esv.text: And the second took her, and died, leaving no offspring. And the third likewise.

cnv.text: 第二個娶了她，也沒有留下孩子，就死了；第三個也是這樣。

ccb.text: 二弟把大嫂娶过来，也没有生孩子就死了，三弟也是一样，

csbs.text: 第二个娶了这寡妇，也死了，没有留下后裔。第三个也一样。
